meaning: adj.闥ｸ豌泌､夂噪,蜀貞倂闥ｸ豌皮噪
examples: He is a vaporous and shifting mirage.
And what vaporous birds do you hunt in the sky?
Conclusion: Vaporous atomization has a great antiinflammatory and antiblastic effect.
Nine crampon-footed hikers crunch up the slope of Athabasca Glacier before stopping to catch their vaporous breath.
She had gotten to the point where the sound of her son taking in this vaporous bronchial-dilating cocktail troubled her as much as it comforted her.
